_comment: Shared golden corpus for the caption text transform. Driven by BOTH the vitest (ui/tests/e2e/helpers/__tests__/captions-vtt.test.ts) AND the pytest (backend/tests/unit/scripts/test_build_guides.py) so the TS normalizeCaption/escapeVttCueText and their Python mirrors cannot drift. Each case: input then normalized then escaped (escaped = escapeVttCueText(normalizeCaption(input))). Licensed Apache-2.0 via REUSE.toml.
